_meta.source: ONS Annual Survey of Hours and Earnings (ASHE) 2025
_meta.methodology: ASHE covers approximately 1% of UK employee jobs, sampled from HMRC PAYE records. Figures are median and percentile gross annual pay for full-time employees. SOC 2020 4-digit occupation codes. 2025 figures reflect ONS ASHE 2025 release (provisional, published November 2025) with ~4.5% nominal wage growth for professional occupations vs ASHE 2024.
_meta.coverage: UK national. London derived from ONS Table 7 regional data.
_meta.limitations: SOC codes map to broad occupational groups, not specific job titles. Software Engineer, Frontend Developer, and Backend Developer all fall under SOC 2136. Seniority bands inferred from P25/P75 spread, not directly from source. Sample sizes for some occupational groups are small.
_meta.notes: All figures are gross annual pay in GBP. Full-time employees only. Part-time and freelance workers not included. Annual pay excludes overtime where identifiable.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2025 Table 14, SOC 2136 Programmers and software development professionals — UK national
records.notes: P25 band derived from ONS percentile spread for SOC 2136. Represents entry-to-early-career range. ASHE 2025 (+4.5% vs 2024).

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2025 Table 14, SOC 2136 Programmers and software development professionals — UK national mid-level
records.notes: P50 (median) for SOC 2136. ONS ASHE 2025 — approximately 4.5% above 2024 median of £52,900.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2025 Table 14, SOC 2136 — UK national senior
records.notes: Senior band derived from P75 and above spread. Includes senior/principal engineers. ASHE 2025.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2025 Table 7 regional, SOC 2136 — London
records.notes: London regional data. ONS Table 7 regional breakdown. London median approximately 37% above UK national for this occupational group. ASHE 2025.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2025 Table 7 regional, SOC 2136 — London senior
records.notes: London senior/P75 band. Based on regional ONS spread with Levels.fyi cross-reference. ASHE 2025.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2025 Table 14, SOC 2133 IT project and programme managers — UK national
records.notes: SOC 2133 is the closest ONS occupational code to product manager. ASHE 2025.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2025 Table 14, SOC 2133 IT project managers — London
records.notes: London regional data for SOC 2133. London premium approximately 35% above national median. ASHE 2025.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2025 Table 14, SOC 2134 IT business analysts — UK national
records.role_raw: IT business analysts, architects and systems designers
records.notes: SOC 2134 covers IT business analysts, architects, and systems designers. Maps to business-analyst and devops-engineer roles. ASHE 2025.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2025 Table 14, SOC 2425 Business and financial project management — UK national
records.role_raw: Business and related research professionals not elsewhere classified
records.notes: Maps to data analyst role. ONS does not have a dedicated 'data analyst' code — this is the closest equivalent. ASHE 2025.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2025 Table 14, SOC 2422 Marketing and sales directors — UK national (management level)
records.notes: Marketing professionals UK median. Maps to marketing-manager role. ASHE 2025.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2025 Table 14, SOC 2137 Web design and development — UK national
records.notes: SOC 2137 web design and development. Maps to designer and frontend-developer roles. ASHE 2025.
